prose:
Frontier-orbital energies for furan were computed at DFT tier 'standard' — B3LYP/def2-TZVP (density-fit RI, PySCF) — in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The geometry was the user-supplied .xyz file used as-is (single-point; no re-optimization at this level). The SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings were reported. The integrity checker returned trustworthy: true (all checks passed).

Results:
  HOMO energy  = −6.3597638 eV (index 17, occupation 2.0)
  LUMO energy  = −0.1024036 eV (index 18, occupation 0.0)
  HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV  ← headline value

Koopmans'-theorem descriptors (from orbital energies):
  Vertical IP            = 6.3598 eV
  Vertical EA            = 0.1024 eV
  Electronegativity (χ)  = 3.2311 eV
  Chemical hardness (η)  = 3.1287 eV
  Chemical softness (S)  = 0.3196 eV⁻¹
  Electrophilicity (ω)   = 1.6684 eV

Reproducibility command:
  cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard \
    /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz
